data.summary: Results-driven Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience designing, building, and deploying scalable web applications. Expert in React, Node.js, and TypeScript, with a proven track record of optimizing system performance and improving user engagement by 25%. Strong background in cloud architecture, CI/CD, and agile development methodologies.

experience.description:
Led a team of 4 developers to redesign and migrate legacy monolith application to a modern microservices architecture using Next.js and Node.js.
• Optimized database query performance on PostgreSQL, reducing page load times by 40%.
• Implemented automated CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, decreasing deployment failure rate by 15%.
• Designed and integrated high-throughput REST APIs, serving over 50,000 active daily users.

Developed and maintained user-facing features for a leading collaborative SaaS platform using React and Express.js.
• Collaborated with product designers to implement pixel-perfect, responsive components, improving mobile user retention by 20%.
• Integrated payment gateway solutions using Stripe API, driving $500K+ in annual recurring revenue.
• Wrote comprehensive unit and integration tests using Jest and Cypress, raising code coverage from 65% to 90%.

education.description: Graduated with Honors. Coursework focused on Software Engineering, Data Structures, and Database Systems.

projects.name: SaaS Analytics Dashboard
projects.description:
A real-time, customizable sales tracking and analytics platform for SaaS businesses.
• Built interactive data visualizations using React, Chart.js, and Tailwind CSS.
• Set up serverless API backend with Node.js and AWS Lambda, processing 10M+ events monthly.
• Implemented secure JWT user authentication and role-based access control.

projects.name: Developer Portfolio Website
projects.description:
Fully responsive, optimized portfolio website showcasing personal projects and technical blog posts.
• Designed clean, minimal UI prioritizing accessibility (WCAG AA compliant).
• Optimized static assets, achieving 100/100 Lighthouse performance score.
• Deployed via Vercel with automatic domain configuration and SSL.
